---
title: "NREC4230: Agricultural Finance"
description: "Local Quarto coursebook for NREC4230 Agricultural Finance, covering agricultural risk management and agricultural finance."
---

# NREC4230: Agricultural Finance

This local coursebook supports **NREC4230 Agricultural Finance**. It is organized as a practical teaching resource for agricultural risk management, financial decision making, and applied farm finance.

The course has two connected parts:

| Part | Focus | Main outcome |
|---|---|---|
| [Part I: Agricultural Risk Management](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/index.qmd) | Risk sources, ARM tools, insurance, markets, government support | Students learn how agricultural risks are identified, classified, and managed |
| [Part II: Agricultural Finance](part-ii-agricultural-finance/index.qmd) | Time value of money, institutions, accounting, ratios, investment appraisal, hedging, insurance design | Students learn how financial tools support farm and agribusiness decisions |

::: {.callout-note}
## Course logic
Part I explains **why risk matters** in agriculture. Part II explains **how financial tools are used** to evaluate decisions, manage risk, and support investment.
:::

## Course map

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[NREC4230 Agricultural Finance] --> B[Part I Agricultural Risk Management]
  A --> C[Part II Agricultural Finance]
  B --> B1[Risk concepts]
  B --> B2[On-farm tools]
  B --> B3[Finance-related tools]
  B --> B4[Market tools]
  B --> B5[Government tools]
  B --> B6[Integrated ARM plan]
  C --> C1[Finance foundations]
  C --> C2[Institutions and credit]
  C --> C3[TVM and annuities]
  C --> C4[Accounting and ratios]
  C --> C5[Investment appraisal]
  C --> C6[Hedging and insurance design]
  C --> C7[Project application]
```

## Lecture notes

### Part I: Agricultural Risk Management

| Lecture | Topic |
|---:|---|
| [01](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-01-understanding-agricultural-risk.qmd) | Understanding Agricultural Risk |
| [02](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-02-on-farm-risk-management-tools.qmd) | On-Farm Risk Management Tools |
| [03](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-03-finance-related-risk-management-tools.qmd) | Finance-Related Risk Management Tools |
| [04](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-04-market-related-risk-management-tools.qmd) | Market-Related Risk Management Tools |
| [05](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-05-government-based-risk-management-tools.qmd) | Government-Based Risk Management Tools |
| [06](part-i-agricultural-risk-management/lecture-06-integrated-arm-plan-for-oman.qmd) | Integrated ARM Plan for Oman |

### Part II: Agricultural Finance

| Lecture | Topic |
|---:|---|
| [07](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-07-introduction-to-agricultural-finance.qmd) | Introduction to Agricultural Finance |
| [08](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-08-financial-institutions-and-intermediation.qmd) | Financial Institutions and Intermediation |
| [09](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-09-time-value-of-money-i.qmd) | Time Value of Money I |
| [10](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-10-time-value-of-money-ii.qmd) | Time Value of Money II |
| [11](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-11-agricultural-accounting.qmd) | Agricultural Accounting |
| [12](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-12-financial-ratio-analysis.qmd) | Financial Ratio Analysis |
| [13](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-13-investment-appraisal.qmd) | Investment Appraisal |
| [14](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-14-futures-hedging-and-basis-risk.qmd) | Futures, Hedging, and Basis Risk |
| [15](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-15-agricultural-insurance-design.qmd) | Agricultural Insurance Design |
| [16](part-ii-agricultural-finance/lecture-16-project-and-research-application.qmd) | Project and Research Application |

## Appendices

| Appendix | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [Formula Sheet](appendices/formulas.qmd) | Main formulas used in agricultural finance and risk management |
| [Glossary](appendices/glossary.qmd) | Key terms used across the course |
| [Practice Problems](appendices/practice-problems.qmd) | Practice questions with answers |
| [Python Code Guide](appendices/python-code-guide.qmd) | Python examples for calculations, tables, and graphs |

## Recommended study path

Students should first read the relevant lecture note, then review the formula sheet, then solve the practice problems. Python examples are optional but recommended for students interested in applied analysis.

::: {.callout-tip}
## For local use
Use `quarto preview` while editing individual pages. Use `quarto render` when the full local coursebook is ready for checking.
:::

## Source note

These lecture notes are adapted for NREC4230 teaching purposes from course materials, FAO/PARM agricultural risk management materials, and agricultural finance examples developed for the course.
